def negative_protocol_method_lacks_type_annotations():
    rule_id = "protocol_method_lacks_type_annotations"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Method in a Protocol class body lacks parameter or return type annotations."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
